flight_intro: Filters used: **non-stop only**, **arrive before 6:00 PM on Saturday, July 18, 2026**, and **depart LAS no later than 4:00 PM on Wednesday, July 22, 2026**. Flight schedules and fares can move, so rerun this updater before booking.

rows.why: Clear nonstop option that lands well before 6:00 PM. Southwest also has nonstop service on this route, and FlightsFrom currently lists Spirit beginning BWI-LAX service on **April 16, 2026**.
This is the only nonstop airline currently shown on LAS-BWI, with **4-5 daily nonstop flights** on the route, so you should have multiple choices that leave before 4:00 PM.

flight_sections.title: NYC
notes: **LGA:** no nonstop `LGA -> LAX` service is currently shown, so it does **not** meet the nonstop-only rule.

rows.why: Daily nonstop schedule pattern currently published into 2026, with an easy pre-6:00 PM arrival.

rows.best_fit: **JetBlue B6 1573**: about 8:50-9:15 AM -> about 11:40 AM-12:10 PM
rows.why: EWR does have nonstop LAX service. Published schedules vary a bit by season, but this pattern is comfortably inside your arrival cutoff.
Clean nonstop return and the safest JFK option relative to your LAS departure cutoff.
Also nonstop and still leaves LAS before 4:00 PM if you prefer a later departure.

hotel_intro: All hotel planning is in one section below: base options, Expedia booking links with single-room nightly pricing, and drive times for only Santa Monica and Universal Studios Hollywood.
hotel_filters: Set a hard cap on total nightly cost with fees.

hotels.name: Hilton Los Angeles Culver City
hotels.why: Reliable full-service base with practical access to I-10 and 405.

hotels.name: Courtyard by Marriott Culver City Los Angeles
hotels.why: Usually a good value/comfort middle ground for family travel.

hotels.name: Four Points by Sheraton Los Angeles Westside
hotels.why: Often lands near budget target with solid parking/location convenience.

hotels.name: Holiday Inn Express West Los Angeles-Santa Monica
hotels.why: Faster beach/UCLA access with simpler in-out logistics.

hotels.name: Gateway Hotel Santa Monica
hotels.why: Usually strong value for a Santa Monica-adjacent location with easy UCLA access.

hotels.name: Hotel Angeleno
hotels.why: Good freeway position for UCLA, Santa Monica, and Universal routing.

hotels.name: Hilton Garden Inn Los Angeles Marina Del Rey
hotels.why: Marina/Westside location with decent access to Santa Monica and Culver City.

hotels.name: Found Santa Monica
hotels.why: Westside base close to Santa Monica and UCLA with walkable dining nearby.

hotels.name: Loews Hollywood Hotel
hotels.why: Premium location for Hollywood day and easier access to Universal-area activities.

hotels.name: Courtyard LA Century City/Beverly Hills
hotels.why: Very central for UCLA, Rodeo Drive, and Santa Monica balance.

hotels.name: Best Western Royal Palace Inn & Suites
hotels.why: Strong value location with direct Westside practicality for your itinerary.
